description:
You are an investigative journalist researching the environmental impact of cryptocurrency mining. Using Firefox, gather data from at least three authoritative sources (EIA.gov, EPA.gov, Whitehouse.gov, or IEA.org) to compile a research brief. Create a bookmark folder named 'Crypto Environmental Research' containing at least five bookmarks from these sources and download a relevant PDF report to ~/Downloads/. Document your findings in a JSON file at ~/Documents/crypto_environmental_brief.json using the following structure:
{
  "topic": "Environmental Impact of Cryptocurrency Mining",
  "bitcoin_annual_energy_twh": <number>,
  "us_crypto_mining_share_global_pct": <number>,
  "co2_equivalent_description": "<string>",
  "ostp_report_year": 2022,
  "key_findings": ["<string>", "<string>", "<string>"],
  "sources": [{"domain": "...", "title": "...", "url": "..."}]
}
